top_signals.title: G7 Ministers Seek Joint Fertilizer Action as War Roils Supplies
top_signals.summary: Group of Seven nations are weighing joint action to protect farmers and bolster food security as the war in the Middle East disrupts fertilizer supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Texas Gas Drillers Shut Out of Oil Price Rally Turn to Shutting Off Wells
top_signals.summary: Two extremes are currently playing out in the Permian Basin. Drillers are reaping the benefits of a historic price rally due to the Iran war. But when it comes to natural gas, they’re having to pay customers to take it away.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Blame bitcoin's tumble on rising inflation, not Strategy, 10xResearch argues
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: JetBlue CEO on Future Plans and Potential Consolidation
top_signals.summary: JetBlue CEO Joanna Geraghty speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) meeting on JetBlue's future plans and potential consolidation, saying "never say never.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
